notes: OWN flash-swap-assisted Suilend repay: aggregator routes 4000 SUI -> 5862.855338 USDC through Cetus/Momentum/FlowX/Bluefin flash-swap legs (idx 2-11, leg events carry no own-wallet semantics), summarized by the aggregator settle::Swap idx 12 (amount_in 3999959615942 SUI, amount_out 5862855338 USDC) = ONE swap:trade. Then RepayEvent idx 16 repays 4792.719911 USDC debt (lend_borrow:repay) and the leftover 1070.135427 USDC is re-supplied: MintEvent idx 18 (1070135427 underlying -> 983424309 ctokens, rate < 1.0 exercises the ctoken!=underlying path) + DepositEvent idx 19 = lend_supply:deposit at the Deposit index with sentAmount = the MintEvent's UNDERLYING liquidity_amount, NOT the ctoken amount. No auto_compounded flag (leftover principal, not a reward claim). Repay+deposit check: 4792719911 + 1070135427 = 5862855338 = swap amount_out. Balance check: -4000004347203 SUI = -3999959615942 swap-in - net gas. handlerId for the swap leg pinned to suilend (dominant-protocol convention, mirroring the cross-01 fixture).
